_meta.note: Demo environment — placeholder data for showcase purposes

activities.name: Column Internals — Delivery
activities.description: Main column internals package delivery to site. Critical procurement item driving downstream construction sequence.
activities.notes: Vendor manufacturing delayed. Fast-track options being explored.

activities.name: Column Foundation — Concrete Works
activities.description: Reinforced concrete foundation for main processing column. Late start and extended duration both contributing to overrun.
activities.notes: Crew redeployment partially executed. 2nd concrete pour rescheduled.

activities.name: Structural Steel Erection — Main Frame
activities.description: Main structural steel frame erection. Dependent on D-C-015 completion.
activities.notes: 2d float remaining. Any further slip will push to critical path.

activities.name: Main Substation — Cable Pulling
activities.description: HV/LV cable pulling for main substation. 1-day float — formally on critical path risk watch.
activities.notes: Cable manufacturer delivery confirmed. Crew mobilisation on track.

activities.name: Heat Exchanger Bundle — Delivery
activities.description: Shell-and-tube heat exchanger bundle. 3d float remaining.

activities.name: Piping Installation — Train A
activities.description: Process piping installation for Train A. Driven by late delivery of column internals and heat exchanger.
activities.notes: Prefabrication being front-loaded to absorb site delivery delays.
